nasb.text: Then when Festus had conferred with his council, he answered, “You have appealed to Caesar, to Caesar you shall go.”

esv.text: Then Festus, when he had conferred with his council, answered, “To Caesar you have appealed; to Caesar you shall go.”

cnv.text: 非斯都同議會商量後，答覆說：“你既然要向凱撒上訴，可以到凱撒那裡去。”

ccb.text: 非斯都和议会商讨后，说：“你说要上诉凯撒，就去见凯撒吧！”

csbs.text: 菲斯特斯与参议会商量以后，就回答：“你已经向凯撒上诉了，你就将到凯撒那里去！”
